name: Cash America Pawn
description_short: Tampa, FL's Cash America Pawn at 7702 N Nebraska Ave offers quick pawn loans, instant cash, and item repairs.
description_long:
Cash America Pawn is located at 7702 N Nebraska Ave in Tampa, FL, serving the area with accessible pawn services. The store is open Monday through Saturday from 9 AM to 6 PM, with convenient hours for working professionals and those seeking quick cash solutions in Tampa.

At this Tampa location, you can sell or pawn jewelry, electronics, tools, instruments, and collectibles for immediate cash. The staff evaluates your items fairly and offers competitive loan terms or outright purchase options. Call +1 813-237-8503 to discuss your items or learn about current offers.

Whether you need emergency cash, want to liquidate unused items, or are looking for quality used goods at fair prices, Cash America Pawn in Tampa provides a straightforward alternative to traditional lending. Bring a valid ID and your items; the process is quick and non-invasive. This Cash America location has been a trusted resource for Tampa residents seeking flexible financial solutions.
pros: 3,300+ store locations across 29 US states, DC, UK, Mexico, Guatemala, Colombia, and El Salvador
Non-recourse pawn loans — lender cannot pursue borrower if collateral is forfeited; no ongoing debt liability
No credit check required for pawn loans
Buys a wide range of items including jewelry, electronics, tools, appliances, sporting goods, and musical instruments
Layaway service available with just 10% down payment
Immediate cash for gold, silver, and platinum
Publicly traded on NASDAQ (FCFS) — regulated, established company with transparent financials
cons: Pawn loan costs are typically equivalent to triple-digit APRs — among the most expensive short-term borrowing options
Items sold or pawned are valued well below retail or market price to allow for store resale margin
Collateral must be physically surrendered and can be sold if loan is not repaid within the agreed term
Coverage limited to 29 states — not available in all US markets
Lease-to-own products via AFF subsidiary also carry high effective costs for consumer goods financing
best_for: Consumers with no bank credit access who need fast cash without a credit check
People who want to sell gold, jewelry, electronics, or other valuables quickly for immediate cash
Bargain shoppers looking for second-hand merchandise at below-retail prices
Individuals needing a short-term bridge loan who own personal property of value
diagnosis: Cash America Pawn is best suited for cash-constrained consumers who own personal property of value and need immediate funds without a credit check or ongoing debt obligation. The main caveat is cost: pawn loans carry very high effective interest rates and items are valued below market, making this a last-resort option rather than a routine borrowing strategy.
services: Pawn loans (non-recourse, collateral-based, no credit check)
Retail merchandise sales (jewelry, electronics, tools, appliances, sporting goods, instruments)
Gold, silver, and platinum buying for immediate cash
Tools and appliances buying and selling
Retail finance installment solutions (15,000+ merchant partner locations via AFF)
Store locator covering US, Latin America, and UK locations
meta_description: Tampa, FL: Cash America Pawn at 7702 N Nebraska Ave. Quick pawn loans, sales, and item evaluations.
